articles.author: Shawn Tully
articles.title: United CEO Scott Kirby and American CEO Robert Isom were once colleagues known as the 'dream team.' Now Kirby wants to acquire his rival - Fortune
articles.description: The dueling CEOs of United and American have a long history of circling each other in the industry.
articles.content: One takeover attempt is bold. Two? Rare indeed. But when news broke in mid-April that the United CEO was interested in acquiring his rival American Airlines, it was the third time this maverick air e… [+3858 chars]
